resources.string: Check your internet connection and try again.
Choose a data plan for your destination country. After payment is confirmed, your eSIM profile will be automatically provisioned and ready for installation.
Open your eSIM details and tap "Install". Your device will download the eSIM profile automatically. Make sure you have an active internet connection during installation.
Go to Settings → Cellular/Mobile Data and turn on your new eSIM line. We recommend activating your eSIM before departing so everything is ready when you land.
Once you arrive at your destination, enable Data Roaming for the eSIM line in your device settings. Your data plan will start automatically.
Your device must support eSIM technology. Most modern smartphones released after 2018 support eSIM. If you encounter any issues, please contact our support team.
